update_instructions: When model specs change (new context windows, new models, deprecated models), update this file and bump last_updated. The plugin reads this file as the single source of truth for all model data.

claude-opus-4-6.cot_approach: Built-in. Use 'think thoroughly' + effort parameter. Do NOT use 'think step by step'.

claude-sonnet-4-6.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helps. Use 'think thoroughly before responding'.

claude-haiku-4-5.cot_approach: Keep simple and direct. Less capable at complex reasoning chains.
claude-haiku-4-5.key_constraint: Keep prompts simple — less capable reasoning

gpt-4.1.cot_approach: Explicit 'Think step by step' needed — does NOT default to reasoning.
gpt-4.1.few_shot: Separate # Examples section with input/output pairs
gpt-4.1.key_constraint: Follows instructions LITERALLY — implicit intent is ignored. Use sandwich method.

gpt-4o.few_shot: Separate # Examples section with input/output pairs

gpt-5.cot_approach: Improved reasoning but explicit CoT still helps on complex tasks.
gpt-5.key_constraint: Baseline GPT-5 release. Superseded by GPT-5.4 (Mar 2026) and GPT-5.5 (Apr 2026) — prefer the later versions for new work.

o1.cot_approach: BUILT-IN. Do NOT add CoT. It HURTS performance.
o1.key_constraint: Use developer messages, not system messages

o3.cot_approach: BUILT-IN. Do NOT add CoT. It HURTS performance.
o3.key_constraint: Use developer messages. Add 'Formatting re-enabled' if markdown needed.

o4-mini.cot_approach: BUILT-IN. Do NOT add CoT. It HURTS performance.
o4-mini.key_constraint: Use developer messages. reasoning_effort param controls depth.

gemini-2.5-pro.cot_approach: 'Plan before responding' for complex tasks. Add self-critique.
gemini-2.5-pro.key_constraint: Temperature MUST stay at 1.0. Consistency in formatting mandatory.

gemini-2.5-flash.key_constraint: Temperature MUST stay at 1.0. Fast but less capable than Pro.

gemini-3.cot_approach: Thinking mode available — treat as reasoning-native when enabled.

llama-4.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helps. 'Let's work through this step by step.'
llama-4.key_constraint: Wrong special tokens silently degrade output

llama-3.key_constraint: Context varies by deployment (8K-128K). Be more explicit than Claude/GPT.

mistral-large.key_constraint: Less precise instruction following — avoid subtle instructions

mixtral.key_constraint: MoE model — fast but may show inconsistency

deepseek-r1.cot_approach: BUILT-IN. Do NOT add explicit CoT. Reasoning is internal.
deepseek-r1.key_constraint: Reasoning-native model. Treat like o-series for technique selection. Strong at math and analysis.

deepseek-v3.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helpful. 'Think step by step' works well.
deepseek-v3.key_constraint: MoE architecture. Strong at code and analysis. Markdown format preferred.

grok-2.key_constraint: xAI API. Less restrictive content policies. Integrated with X/Twitter.

grok-3.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helpful. May have reasoning mode — verify.
grok-3.key_constraint: xAI flagship. Verify current specs — may have reasoning variant.

qwen-2.5.key_constraint: Open-weight. Strong multilingual (especially CJK). Multiple sizes: 0.5B-72B.

qwen-2.5-coder.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helpful for complex code tasks.
qwen-2.5-coder.key_constraint: Code-specialized. Open-weight. Top-tier on code benchmarks.

qwq-32b.cot_approach: BUILT-IN. Do NOT add explicit CoT.
qwq-32b.key_constraint: Reasoning model similar to o1. Open-weight 32B. Treat like o-series.

command-r-plus.key_constraint: Strong at RAG workflows. Native citation/grounding. Enterprise-focused.

jamba-1.5.key_constraint: SSM-Transformer hybrid (Mamba). 256K context. Efficient long-context processing.

amazon-nova-pro.key_constraint: AWS Bedrock. Multimodal (text, image, video). 300K context.

phi-4.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helpful. Strong reasoning for its size.
phi-4.key_constraint: 14B params. Punches above weight class at math/reasoning. Open-weight.

yi-lightning.key_constraint: Fast inference. Chinese/English bilingual. Open-weight versions available.

codestral.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helpful for complex code tasks.

sonar-pro.cot_approach: Not applicable — search-augmented, not raw reasoning.
sonar-pro.key_constraint: Always web-grounded with citations. Not a standalone LLM — search-augmented wrapper.

dall-e-3.key_constraint: Natural language prompts (not keyword lists). No negative prompts. Content policy restrictions.

midjourney-v6.key_constraint: Discord/web. Params: --ar, --v, --style raw, --chaos, --no. Front-load important terms.

stable-diffusion-3.5.key_constraint: Open-weight. Requires negative prompt. Weight syntax: (term:1.5). LoRA support.

flux-1-pro.key_constraint: From ex-Stability AI founders. Strong text rendering. Natural language prompts preferred over keywords.

ideogram-2.key_constraint: Best-in-class text rendering in images. Strong at typography and logos.

nano-banana.key_constraint: Image gen model available on use.ai, Higgsfield, and others. Natural language prompts. Supports style presets.

nano-banana-2.key_constraint: Updated version of Nano Banana. Improved coherence and quality. Natural language prompts.

nano-banana-pro.key_constraint: Pro tier of Nano Banana. Higher fidelity output. Available across use.ai, Higgsfield, and similar platforms.

seedream-4.5.key_constraint: ByteDance Seed image gen. DiT architecture. Strong bilingual (Chinese/English) prompt understanding. High aesthetic quality.

flux-2-pro.key_constraint: Successor to Flux 1 Pro. Improved coherence, text rendering, prompt adherence. API-accessible. Natural language prompts.

flux-2-flex.key_constraint: Flex variant optimized for image-to-image, inpainting, and control conditioning. Versatile input modes.

flux-2-max.key_constraint: Top-tier Flux variant. Highest output fidelity and largest model. Best quality at cost of speed.

imagen-3.key_constraint: Vertex AI and Gemini integration. Photorealistic quality. Google's flagship image model.

runway-gen3.key_constraint: Text/image-to-video. Industry leader for creative video. API available.

seedance-2.key_constraint: Text/image-to-video. Up to 2 min at 1080p. Multi-shot storytelling with subject consistency. Synced audio/dialogue/lip-sync in 8+ languages.

elevenlabs.key_constraint: Premium TTS/voice cloning. Most natural-sounding synthesis. Multilingual. API available.

suno-v4.key_constraint: Text-to-music. Full songs with vocals. Prompt: lyrics + genre/style description.

gpt-image-1.5.key_constraint: Built into GPT-5. 4x faster than GPT Image 1. Top-ranked on Artificial Analysis. Natural language prompts.

gpt-image-1.key_constraint: Built into GPT-4o architecture. Multi-platform availability. Natural language prompts.

midjourney-v7.key_constraint: Complete architecture rebuild from v6. Default since Jun 2025. Params: --ar, --style raw, --chaos, --no.

midjourney-v8-alpha.key_constraint: First V8 Alpha launched Mar 17, 2026. 4-5x faster than v7. Native 2K with --hd. Preview/alpha — specs may change.

niji-7.key_constraint: Anime-specialized. Midjourney x Spellbrush collab. Best for anime/manga/illustration styles.

imagen-4.key_constraint: Google's latest. Fast/Standard/Ultra tiers. Up to 2K resolution. Vertex AI + Gemini API.

ideogram-3.key_constraint: Turbo/Balanced/Quality variants. Best-in-class typography. Major upgrade from v2.

recraft-v4.key_constraint: Raster + native SVG vector output. 4 sub-variants (Standard, Vector, Pro, Pro Vector). Best long text rendering.

reve-image-1.key_constraint: #1 on Artificial Analysis leaderboard at launch. Strong typography + prompt adherence.

firefly-image-5.key_constraint: Native 4MP, layered output, custom model training. Commercially safe (licensed content only).

seedream-5.key_constraint: Web-connected search, multi-image input, 2K/3K output. Successor to Seedream 4.5.

luma-photon.key_constraint: $0.015/image. Character consistency from single reference. Flash variant at $0.002/image.

flux-kontext-max.key_constraint: Context-aware editing. Up to 10 input images. Typography support. Web grounding.

flux-1-schnell.key_constraint: Apache 2.0, fully commercial. 4-step generation. Speed-optimized. Open-weight.

hunyuan-image-3.key_constraint: HunyuanImage-3.0-Instruct released Jan 26, 2026. 80B MoE. Largest open-source image gen. Unified autoregressive multimodal framework. Distilled variant runs in ~8 sampling steps.

kling-image-03.key_constraint: Reasoning-based generation. 2K/4K native. Up to 10 reference images.

wan-2.7.key_constraint: Thinking Mode for reasoning-based generation. Long-text rendering. Precise color control.

claude-opus-4-7.cot_approach: Built-in. Use 'think thoroughly' + effort parameter. Do NOT use 'think step by step'.
claude-opus-4-7.key_constraint: Released Apr 16, 2026. SWE-bench Pro 64.3% (up from 53.4% on 4.6). Vision 2576px / ~3.75MP. New tokenizer emits up to 35% more tokens for same input text — budget accordingly. Pricing unchanged from 4.6.

gpt-5.4.cot_approach: Thinking and Pro variants have built-in reasoning; base variant benefits from explicit CoT.
gpt-5.4.few_shot: Separate # Examples section with input/output pairs
gpt-5.4.key_constraint: Released Mar 5, 2026. Variants: Thinking, Pro, mini (Mar 17), nano (Mar 17). Built-in computer-use. 33% fewer factual errors vs 5.2. OSWorld-Verified 75% (vs 47.3% on 5.2). Superseded as flagship by 5.5 Apr 23.

gpt-5.5.cot_approach: Thinking variant unlocks deeper reasoning on harder problems. Base variant benefits from explicit CoT.
gpt-5.5.few_shot: Separate # Examples section with input/output pairs
gpt-5.5.key_constraint: Released Apr 23, 2026. First fully retrained base since GPT-4.5. API pricing $5/M input, $30/M output. 1M context. Variants: Thinking, Pro. Strong at agentic coding, research, data analysis, document/spreadsheet creation, multi-tool workflows.

gpt-5.5-pro.cot_approach: Pro variant has extended reasoning depth — avoid explicit CoT stacking.
gpt-5.5-pro.few_shot: Separate # Examples section with input/output pairs
gpt-5.5-pro.key_constraint: Released Apr 23, 2026. Higher-accuracy tier of GPT-5.5. API pricing $30/M input, $180/M output — 6x the base 5.5 cost. Use only when base 5.5 quality is insufficient; sandwich method still applies.

gpt-image-2.key_constraint: Released Apr 21, 2026. Native reasoning before generation. 2K output, multi-image consistency, context-aware multi-turn editing. Arena score 1512 (+242 over Nano Banana 2 — largest gap on record). Built on GPT-5.4 backbone. Replaces DALL-E 3 and GPT Image 1.5 in ChatGPT.

gemini-3-pro.cot_approach: Extended thinking built-in. Deep Think mode available.
gemini-3-pro.key_constraint: Reasoning-native flagship. Temperature MUST stay at 1.0. Superseded by 3.1 Pro as of Feb 2026 — prefer 3.1 Pro for new work.

gemini-3.1-pro.cot_approach: Extended thinking built-in. Deep Think mode for hardest problems (RE-Bench 1.27 vs 1.04 on 3 Pro). Avoid forcing explicit CoT.
gemini-3.1-pro.few_shot: ALWAYS REQUIRED — Google's guidance applies despite reasoning-native status
gemini-3.1-pro.key_constraint: Released Feb 19, 2026. 1M context, 64K output. Text/image/audio/video input. Pricing $2/M input, $12/M output. Temperature MUST stay at 1.0. Powers Google Deep Research/Deep Research Max (Apr 22, 2026).

gemini-3.1-flash.cot_approach: 'Plan before responding' for complex tasks. Thinking mode available.
gemini-3.1-flash.key_constraint: Fast/cheap tier of the 3.1 family. Temperature MUST stay at 1.0. Powers Nano Banana 2 image gen and 3.1 Flash TTS (30 conversational voices).

grok-4.20.cot_approach: Multi-agent reasoning is built-in via Heavy system. Avoid forcing external CoT on reasoning variant.
grok-4.20.few_shot: 2-3 examples recommended for base chat; unneeded for Heavy
grok-4.20.key_constraint: Released Mar 3, 2026 (Beta 2). 4-agent Heavy system: Grok (coordinator), Harper (research), Benjamin (logic/math), Lucas (contrarian). 2M context. xAI API.

grok-4.3.key_constraint: Released Apr 17, 2026. Native video input/processing. Slide generation in-chat. 16-agent Heavy carries over from 4.20. 2M context. Beta — verify specs before production.

llama-5.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helps. 'Let's work through this step by step.'
llama-5.key_constraint: Released Apr 8, 2026. 600B+ params, open-weight. 5M context — longest of any widely available model. Ships with Llama Guard 4 safety layer. Wrong special tokens silently degrade output.

deepseek-v4-pro.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helpful. 'Think step by step' works well.
deepseek-v4-pro.key_constraint: Released Apr 24, 2026. MoE 1.6T params (49B active). 1M context via hybrid Compressed Sparse + Heavily Compressed Attention — 27% of V3.2's inference FLOPs, 10% of KV cache. Pricing $1.74/M input, $3.48/M output. Open-weight on HF.

deepseek-v4-flash.key_constraint: Released Apr 24, 2026. MoE 284B params (13B active). 1M context. Pricing $0.14/M input, $0.28/M output — near-commodity cost for frontier-ish quality. Open-weight on HF.

deepseek-r2.cot_approach: BUILT-IN. Do NOT add explicit CoT. Reasoning is internal.
deepseek-r2.few_shot: 2-3 examples helpful for format calibration only
deepseek-r2.key_constraint: Released late Feb 2026. Second-generation reasoning model. Treat like o-series for technique selection. Strong at math and scientific analysis.

qwen-3.6-plus.cot_approach: Reasoning is active by default on EVERY prompt — no switch, no separate mode. Do NOT stack explicit CoT.
qwen-3.6-plus.key_constraint: Released Apr 2, 2026. Hybrid linear attention + sparse MoE routing. 1M context. Multimodal. Built for agentic coding workflows. Alibaba Cloud API.

qwen-3.6-max.cot_approach: Reasoning built-in; preserve_thinking flag retains state across multi-turn agent loops.
qwen-3.6-max.key_constraint: Released Apr 20, 2026. MoE 35B total / 3B active. 260K context. CLOSED-WEIGHTS (first for Qwen flagship). OpenAI + Anthropic API compatible. Claims top rank on SWE-Bench Pro, Terminal-Bench 2.0, SkillsBench, SciCode, plus internal benchmarks.

mistral-large-3.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helpful. Reasoning variant not yet shipped as of Apr 2026.
mistral-large-3.key_constraint: Released Dec 2, 2025. Granular MoE: 675B total / 41B active. Apache 2.0 open-weight — largest OSS MoE from a major lab. 256K context. MMLU-Pro 73.11, MATH-500 93.60.

veo-4.key_constraint: Released Apr 2026. 4K output, clips up to 30s, native audio. Storyboarding with per-scene prompts + camera/action control for unified narrative. Zero-shot avatar creation. Improved character consistency. Google AI Pro/Ultra only.

midjourney-v8.1-alpha.key_constraint: Preview launched Apr 14, 2026 on alpha.midjourney.com. Default HD (native 2K without upscale). HD mode 3x faster and 3x cheaper vs v8 alpha. Standard mode 50% faster, 25% cheaper. Alpha — specs may change.

suno-v5.5.key_constraint: Released Mar 25, 2026. Voice cloning, custom models (train Suno on your music), automatic preference learning. Text-to-music with vocals. Prompt = lyrics + genre/style.

kling-3-video.key_constraint: Released Feb 5, 2026. Up to 15s video. Native audio generation (multilingual + dialect/accent). Video 3.0 Omni variant for full multimodal in/out. Consistency and photorealism upgrade over 2.x.

kimi-k1-5.cot_approach: Built-in via RL. Do NOT add explicit 'think step by step' — CoT is emitted by the model.
kimi-k1-5.few_shot: Avoid — zero-shot or minimal-shot preferred for reasoning tasks
kimi-k1-5.key_constraint: Released Jan 20, 2025. Text-only reasoning (no multimodal). Matches o1 on math/coding.

kimi-k2.key_constraint: Jul 2025 release. 1T params / 32B active MoE, open-weight modified-MIT. Base K2 128K context.

kimi-k2-5.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helps on complex tasks.

kimi-k2-6.cot_approach: Built-in agent-loop reasoning; explicit CoT redundant in Agent Swarm mode.
kimi-k2-6.key_constraint: Released Apr 20, 2026. 1T/32B MoE, open-weight. 300-agent Swarm, 4000-step horizons, MoonViT vision encoder.

kimi-linear.key_constraint: Oct 2025. 48B/3B MoE with Kimi Delta Attention — efficient long-context variant, not a frontier replacement for K2.

glm-4-5.cot_approach: Dual-mode: 'thinking' flag toggles extended reasoning; otherwise fast reply.
glm-4-5.key_constraint: Jul 2025. 355B/32B MoE, MIT-licensed. Use thinking=enabled for reasoning/agent tasks.

glm-4-6.cot_approach: Use <reasoning_content>...</reasoning_content> wrapper — the <thinking> tag does NOT trigger reasoning.
glm-4-6.key_constraint: Sep 2025. 355B MoE, MIT. 200K context. Use personas over adjectives; put constraints HIGH.

glm-5.cot_approach: Built-in extended thinking with DeepSeek Sparse Attention over long context.
glm-5.key_constraint: Released Feb 11, 2026. 745B/44B MoE (256 experts, 8 active). Trained fully on Huawei Ascend / MindSpore.

minimax-01.key_constraint: Jan 2025. 456B/45.9B MoE with Lightning (linear) Attention. 1M train / 4M inference context — largest open context window.

minimax-m1.few_shot: Avoid heavy few-shot on reasoning paths
minimax-m1.key_constraint: Jun 2025. Lightning-attention reasoning model built on MiniMax-01 stack.

minimax-m2.key_constraint: Oct 26, 2025. Agent/coding focus; 204.8K official context window.

minimax-m2-7.cot_approach: Built-in; self-evolution loop handles internal reasoning.
minimax-m2-7.key_constraint: Mar 18, 2026. ~230B/10B MoE, self-evolving (handles 30-50% of its own training). $0.30/M tokens.

step-2-16k.key_constraint: Jul 2024. Trillion-parameter MoE; first Chinese startup 1T-param model. Short 16K context limits long-doc use.

step-r1-v-mini.key_constraint: Apr 2025. Multimodal reasoning model for visual/image interpretation.

step-3.key_constraint: Jul 2025. 321B/38B MoE VLM with MFA + AFD co-design for cheap decoding. Open-weight on HF.

step-3-5-flash.key_constraint: Lightweight open-source MoE 196.81B total / ~11B active. Designed for agents.

ernie-4-5.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helps; a 28B-A3B 'Thinking' variant exists with built-in reasoning.
ernie-4-5.key_constraint: Apache 2.0 open-weight family (incl. ERNIE-4.5-VL-28B-A3B-Thinking). Predecessor to ERNIE 5.0.

ernie-5.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helps on text tasks.
ernie-5.key_constraint: Official launch Jan 22, 2026 (unveiled Nov 13, 2025). 2.4T param native omni-modal (text/image/audio/video). Proprietary, PaddlePaddle-based.

hunyuan-turbo-s.cot_approach: Adaptive long/short CoT fusion — model auto-selects depth.
hunyuan-turbo-s.key_constraint: Feb 27, 2025. Hybrid Transformer-Mamba MoE; fast-thinking base for T1.

hunyuan-t1.cot_approach: Built-in deep reasoning — do NOT add explicit CoT.
hunyuan-t1.key_constraint: Mar 29, 2025 GA. Hybrid-Mamba-Transformer MoE reasoning model. MMLU-PRO 87.2, rivals DeepSeek-R1 at R1-tier pricing.

hunyuan-2.key_constraint: Dec 8, 2025. 406B-parameter next-gen Hunyuan flagship text model.

skywork-o1.cot_approach: Built-in deep thought + self-reflection — do NOT add explicit CoT.
skywork-o1.key_constraint: Feb 2025. First Chinese logical-reasoning LLM; Open/Lite/Preview variants. Open-weight family on HF.

skywork-or1-32b.key_constraint: Apr 13, 2025. Open-source, approaches DeepSeek-R1-671B on code/math at 32B scale.

command-a-03-2025.cot_approach: Prompt-driven step-by-step; no native thinking channel.
command-a-03-2025.key_constraint: 111B, 256K ctx, runs on 2 GPUs; released Mar 2025; tool-use/RAG-optimized, prefers structured JSON tool schemas.

command-a-reasoning-08-2025.cot_approach: Built-in reasoning traces; avoid external CoT prompting.
command-a-reasoning-08-2025.key_constraint: Released Aug 2025; 32K max output for extended reasoning — keep prompt lean, let model think.

command-a-vision-07-2025.key_constraint: Released Jul 2025; image+text in, text out; 128K ctx — enterprise doc/chart understanding.

command-r-08-2024.key_constraint: 32B refresh, 50% higher throughput vs prior R; improved tool-use decisioning; Safety Modes beta flag.

command-r7b-12-2024.cot_approach: Explicit CoT; tight context helps small model.
command-r7b-12-2024.key_constraint: Final R-series model, 7B; strong RAG/tool-use for size; released Dec 2024.

aya-expanse-32b.key_constraint: Released Dec 2024; 23-language frontier model — specify target language explicitly for best results.

phi-4-mini-instruct.key_constraint: 3.8B dense; function calling supported as of Feb 2025; small model — terse prompts and examples essential.

phi-4-multimodal-instruct.cot_approach: Modality-specific LoRA adapters; don't mix prompts across modalities in one turn.
phi-4-multimodal-instruct.key_constraint: 5.6B unified speech+vision+text; released Feb 2025; use modality routers — don't flip mid-prompt.

phi-4-reasoning.cot_approach: Trained on o3-mini traces; emits <think> blocks natively — no external CoT.
phi-4-reasoning.key_constraint: 14B reasoning model released Apr-May 2025; runs on laptops; STEM/code focus — strip preambles.

phi-4-mini-reasoning.key_constraint: 3.8B math-specialist; released Apr 2025 — do NOT add 'think step by step', already doing it.

phi-4-mini-flash-reasoning.key_constraint: Released Jul 2025; 64K ctx; latency-optimized math reasoning — terser prompts exploit speed gain.

llama-3.1-nemotron-70b-instruct.cot_approach: RLHF'd for helpful verbose answers; explicit CoT still helps.
llama-3.1-nemotron-70b-instruct.key_constraint: Released Oct 2024; HelpSteer2-tuned — tends to over-explain, ask for concise output if needed.

llama-3.1-nemotron-ultra-253b-v1.cot_approach: Dynamic reasoning toggle — set system flag to enable/disable thinking.
llama-3.1-nemotron-ultra-253b-v1.key_constraint: Released 2025; first open model with toggleable reasoning — control via system prompt flag, not prompt engineering.

nemotron-mini-4b-instruct.key_constraint: Released Sep 2024; distilled from Nemotron-4 15B for on-device roleplay/RAG/function-calling — 4K ctx is the hard wall.

nemotron-4-340b-instruct.key_constraint: Released Jun 2024; intended for synthetic-data generation and instruction tuning, not general chat.

granite-3.1-8b-instruct.cot_approach: Explicit step-by-step; enterprise-tuned so prefers formal tone.
granite-3.1-8b-instruct.key_constraint: Released Dec 2024; context extended from 4K→128K via RoPE — 12 languages; tool-use supported.

granite-3.2-8b-instruct.cot_approach: Optional thinking toggle; VLM variant for documents.
granite-3.2-8b-instruct.key_constraint: Released Feb 26 2025; adds reasoning + vision variants; enterprise doc-understanding focus.

granite-4.0-h-small.cot_approach: Standard CoT; hybrid arch favors long ctx.
granite-4.0-h-small.key_constraint: Released Oct 2025; hybrid Mamba-2/Transformer MoE 32B-total/9B-active — 70% less memory, 2x faster long-ctx.

granite-code-34b-instruct.cot_approach: Think before coding; show signatures first.
granite-code-34b-instruct.key_constraint: Released May 2024; trained on 116 languages — specify language explicitly; 8K ctx limits whole-repo tasks.

falcon3-7b-instruct.key_constraint: Released Dec 2024; 14T-token training; 1.58-bit quant variants available — small-model terseness applies.

falcon3-mamba-7b-instruct.cot_approach: SSM-based; linear-time inference favors long prompts.
falcon3-mamba-7b-instruct.key_constraint: Released Dec 2024; pure Mamba SSM (no attention) — different recall profile than transformers, test carefully.

falcon-h1-34b-instruct.key_constraint: Released May 2025; 262K ctx; 18 languages native incl. Arabic — specify lang in system prompt.

falcon-h1r-7b.cot_approach: GRPO-trained native reasoning; emits long-form thinking.
falcon-h1r-7b.key_constraint: Released Jan 2026; 7B reasoning matching 14-47B on math/code — budget output tokens generously.

solar-pro-2.cot_approach: Dual-mode: Chat Mode or Reasoning Mode — user selects.
solar-pro-2.key_constraint: Released Jul 2025; 31B agentic; toggle mode via API flag — Korean/English/Japanese strongest.

inflection-3-pi.key_constraint: Released Oct 2024; EQ/roleplay/support focus — conversational register, 8K ctx limits doc tasks.

jamba-1.6-mini.key_constraint: Released Mar 6 2025; 52B/12B-active MoE; grounded-generation + JSON output native.

jamba-1.6-large.cot_approach: Hybrid SSM; explicit CoT still helps.
jamba-1.6-large.key_constraint: Released Mar 2025; 398B/94B-active; best open model for private enterprise long-ctx deployment.

jamba-1.7-large.key_constraint: Released Jul 7 2025; grounding + instruction-following gains over 1.6.

reka-flash-3.cot_approach: Budget-forcing: specify max reasoning steps via special tags.
reka-flash-3.key_constraint: Released Mar 11 2025; 21B; unique 'budget forcing' — cap thinking tokens via tag, don't prompt-engineer it.

snowflake-arctic-instruct.key_constraint: Released Apr 2024; 480B/17B-active MoE; SQL+code specialist — 4K ctx is the bottleneck.

palmyra-x5.cot_approach: Adaptive reasoning — model decides depth; sub-second tool calling.
palmyra-x5.key_constraint: Released Apr 28 2025; 1M ctx, 8K max output; use full-doc grounding, not excerpts.

sonar-reasoning.cot_approach: Powered by DeepSeek-R1 1776 variant — native step reasoning.
sonar-reasoning.key_constraint: Released Feb 2025; search-grounded reasoning — queries trigger web retrieval, don't paste sources.

sonar-deep-research.cot_approach: Autonomous multi-step retrieval + synthesis; 20-50 queries per run.
sonar-deep-research.key_constraint: Released 2025; autonomous research agent — expect 200+ sources per report, specify scope tightly.

apple-foundation-on-device.cot_approach: Guided generation via Swift framework constrains output shape.
apple-foundation-on-device.key_constraint: Released Jun 2025 (WWDC25); ~3B on-device, 16 langs; use Swift Foundation Models API + LoRA adapters, not raw prompts.

apple-foundation-server.key_constraint: Released Jun 2025; Parallel-Track MoE; accessible only via Apple Intelligence — not a public API.

gemma-2-27b-it.cot_approach: Explicit CoT required; no native thinking.
gemma-2-27b-it.key_constraint: Released Jun 2024; interleaved local/global attn; 8K ctx is the hard wall — chunk long inputs.

gemma-2-9b-it.key_constraint: Released Jun 2024; outperforms Llama 3 8B; 8K ctx — few-shot always.

gemma-3-27b-it.key_constraint: Released Mar 12 2025; 140+ langs, vision via SigLIP; 1B variant is 32K ctx only.

gemma-3-12b-it.key_constraint: Released Mar 2025; multimodal + function calling + structured outputs; always few-shot.

gemma-3-4b-it.cot_approach: Explicit CoT; terse prompts for small model.
gemma-3-4b-it.key_constraint: Released Mar 2025; laptop-deployable multimodal; few-shot examples mandatory.

codegemma-7b-it.key_constraint: Released Apr 9 2024; fill-in-middle supported via special tokens; specify language.

paligemma-3b.cot_approach: Caption/VQA style — short task prefix + image.
paligemma-3b.key_constraint: Released May 14 2024; SigLIP+Gemma VLM; task prefix format (caption/detect/segment) drives behavior, not CoT.

shieldgemma-2-4b.key_constraint: Released 2025 on Gemma-3 base; safety classifier for images — use official policy templates, not free-form.

recurrentgemma-9b.cot_approach: Griffin arch; finite-state — memory doesn't grow past 2K local window.
recurrentgemma-9b.key_constraint: Released Apr 11 2024; recurrent+local-attn hybrid — long-range recall weaker than transformer peers.

gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview.cot_approach: Configurable thinking_level (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH); defaults to low dynamic thinking for latency-critical workloads.
gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview.key_constraint: Released Mar 2026. Temperature MUST stay at 1.0. Built for cost/latency — keep prompts tight; set thinking_level=LOW unless task demands deeper reasoning.

gemini-embedding-2-preview.cot_approach: None — embedding-only model; no generative reasoning.
gemini-embedding-2-preview.key_constraint: Released 2026. First natively multimodal Gemini embedding (text+image+video+audio+docs in one space). Pass task_type — skipping it degrades retrieval quality.

gemini-embedding-001.key_constraint: Text-only GA embedding. task_type required for best recall; 3072-dim default with Matryoshka truncation to 768/1536.

gemini-robotics-er-1.6-preview.cot_approach: Embodied spatial reasoning over camera frames; returns structured action/grounding plans rather than free prose.
gemini-robotics-er-1.6-preview.key_constraint: Released Apr 14 2026. Temperature MUST stay at 1.0. Specialised for physical/robot scenes — prompt with image+task+constraints schema; prior ER-1.5 shuts down Apr 30 2026.

gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview.cot_approach: Real-time dialogue tuned; minimise internal reasoning to preserve <500ms voice latency.
gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview.key_constraint: Released 2026 via Live API (WebSocket). Temperature MUST stay at 1.0. System prompt is the ONLY place to set persona — per-turn instructions often lost in streaming context.

gemini-nano-chrome.cot_approach: Single-turn only; no chain-of-thought — short instruction + input performs best.
gemini-nano-chrome.key_constraint: Chrome 138+ behind flags. English/Spanish/Japanese (from Chrome 140), text-only, no images. Suits summarise / reformulate / classify; quality degrades on multi-step tasks — decompose server-side.

gemini-nano-mlkit.cot_approach: No CoT — designed for short focused prompts; keep under a few hundred tokens.
gemini-nano-mlkit.key_constraint: Android on-device via AICore on Pixel 8+/9/compatible devices. Safety filters non-configurable; output truncated silently when device thermals throttle — handle partial responses.

playground-v3.key_constraint: Deep-integrated Llama3-8B LLM as text encoder, not CLIP — write full descriptive sentences, not keyword lists. Strong at logos/typography. Commercial API via Playground platform.

leonardo-phoenix-1-0.key_constraint: Leonardo's first in-house foundation model (not SDXL fine-tune). Up to 5MP. Supports negative prompts and alchemy/contrast toggles. Iterative Edit-with-AI via API.

leonardo-lucid-origin.key_constraint: Full HD, strong prompt adherence on multi-element scenes; vivid saturation. Available on Cloudflare Workers AI and Leonardo API. Relaxed-tier unlimited.

leonardo-anime-xl.key_constraint: SDXL-derived; CLIP 77-token cap. Use Danbooru-style tags and character descriptors. Negative prompts required to avoid realism drift.

krea-1.key_constraint: Photorealism-tuned to avoid 'AI look'. Up to 4K/16MP. Open-weights variant FLUX.1-Krea-dev available under FLUX.1-dev non-commercial license.

flux-krea-dev.key_constraint: Open-weights version of Krea 1, 12B rectified-flow transformer. Non-commercial FLUX.1-dev license; compatible with FLUX LoRAs. Opinionated aesthetic bias.

bria-2-3.key_constraint: Fully licensed training data, full IP indemnity. Do not request trademarked/fictional characters, public figures, or logos — the model refuses and the license voids.

bria-3-2.key_constraint: Latest Bria pipeline. Commercial-only licensing with full legal liability coverage. Same IP-safe content constraints as 2.3; upgraded illustration/human rendering.

higgsfield-soul-2.key_constraint: Released 2026-02-17. Fashion/editorial aesthetic foundation model with 20+ curated presets — name a preset for consistent look. Soul-ID for character consistency.

stable-image-ultra.key_constraint: SD3.5-Large-backed hosted service via REST v2beta. $0.08/image. Supports negative_prompt, aspect_ratio, seed. Distinct API endpoint from SD3.5-Large weights.

stable-image-core.key_constraint: 1.5MP output, style-preset parameter (cinematic, anime, photographic, etc.). 'No prompt engineering needed' — short natural prompts preferred over long flux-style.

sd-3-5-large-turbo.key_constraint: Distilled 4-step variant of SD3.5-Large. Do not set cfg>1 or steps>8 — both degrade output. Same MMDiT prompt style as SD3.5 base.

sd-3-5-medium.key_constraint: 2.5B MMDiT-X, runs on consumer GPU. 0.25–2MP resolution range. Community license: free under $1M revenue. Separate from SD3.5-Large endpoints.

stable-cascade.key_constraint: 3-stage Würstchen pipeline (A/B/C); 42x compression. Non-commercial research license only. Tune Stage C prompt separately from Stage B refinement for best control.

dall-e-3-hd.key_constraint: Quality='hd' on dall-e-3 — a knob, not a separate model. Triggers silent prompt rewrite by OpenAI; prepend 'I NEED to test...' to bypass rewrite.

seedream-5-lite.key_constraint: Released 2026-02. Deep-thinking + web-search-integrated generation; up to 14 reference images per request. $0.035/image (~22% cheaper than 4.5). Native edit support.

grok-imagine.key_constraint: Aurora MoE autoregressive backbone; hybrid with Flux.1 Pro text rendering. $0.02/image API. 'Spicy' mode unlocks NSFW. SuperGrok $30/mo minimum for web.

luma-photon-flash.key_constraint: Speed-optimized Photon at $0.002/image. Same prompt grammar as Photon 1 but trades fine detail for latency. Same ref-image slots retained.

amazon-titan-image-g1-v2.key_constraint: Bedrock-only (us-east-1, us-west-2). v2 adds image-conditioning, background removal, color-palette hex control, subject-consistency fine-tune. Console lacks v2 features — API only.

nvidia-sana.key_constraint: Linear-attention DiT, 4096x4096 native, uses Gemma-style decoder-only LLM as text encoder (not T5). Non-commercial research license. 23x faster than FLUX-dev.

hart-0-7b.key_constraint: Hybrid autoregressive (discrete AR + 37M residual diffusion). 1024x1024 only. Apache 2.0 code; weights MIT. Throughput 4.5–7.7x diffusion peers.

lumina-image-2.key_constraint: Main weights Apache 2.0 BUT bundled VAE is from FLUX.1-dev (non-commercial). Swap to FLUX-schnell VAE for commercial use. Unified text+image framework.

pixart-sigma.key_constraint: Pure-transformer latent diffusion, native 4K in single pass. CreativeML Open RAIL++-M license. 1024-MS and 512-MS checkpoints.

hunyuan-image-2-1.key_constraint: 17B params, native 2K. Open weights (Tencent Hunyuan license). 1000-token ultra-long prompt budget. Strong bilingual CN/EN text rendering for posters.

qwen-image-2-0.key_constraint: Released 2026-02-10. 7B unified gen+edit (down from 20B in v1). Apache 2.0. Commercial-grade Chinese and English text-in-image rendering — its headline strength.

illustrious-xl-1-0.key_constraint: SDXL-base anime model. CLIP 77-token cap, Danbooru tags preferred over sentences. Use `1girl, 1boy` count tags. Fair-AI license restricts pure commercial resale.

noobai-xl.key_constraint: Illustrious-XL fine-tune; ships in epsilon and v-prediction forms — v-pred requires ZSNR scheduler + rescale_cfg≈0.7 or outputs go grey. Danbooru tags.

animagine-xl-4.key_constraint: SDXL-retrained on 8.4M anime images. Quality tags `masterpiece, best quality, newest` required; year tags affect style era. Fair-AI license.

meta-imagine-emu.key_constraint: No public API — consumer-only via Imagine.meta.com, WhatsApp/Messenger/IG chat. Region-gated. Skip if API access is required; there is no commercial endpoint.

sora-1.key_constraint: Up to 20s, 1080p, text-to-video and image-to-video via ChatGPT Plus/Pro. No native audio. Released Dec 2024. Commercial use per OpenAI ToS. Multi-shot via storyboard.

sora-1-turbo.key_constraint: Faster Sora 1 variant for ChatGPT Plus, 5-20s clips, 480p/720p/1080p tiers. No native audio. Image-to-video and remix supported.

sora-2.key_constraint: Native synchronized audio (speech+SFX), improved physics, up to 25s, 1080p. Cameo feature for identity insertion. Released Sept 2025. API via sora-2 endpoint.

sora-2-pro.key_constraint: Higher-fidelity Sora 2 tier; longer clips, better prompt adherence, native audio. ChatGPT Pro tier. Released Oct 2025.

veo-2.key_constraint: Up to 4K, 8s clips via Vertex AI / Gemini API. Text- and image-to-video. No native audio. Cinematic camera controls in prompt grammar.

veo-3.key_constraint: Native synchronized audio (dialogue, SFX, music), 1080p, 8s. I2V supported. Released May 2025 via Vertex/Gemini API. Commercial use permitted.

veo-3-1.key_constraint: Veo 3 successor: richer audio, stronger character consistency, ingredients-to-video (multi-reference). Released Oct 2025 via Vertex AI.

runway-gen-4.key_constraint: Character/object consistency across shots via reference images, 5-10s, 720p/1080p. Released Mar 2025. API available. Act-One and Aleph are features, not separate models.

runway-gen-4-turbo.key_constraint: Speed-optimized Gen-4, ~5x faster, lower cost per clip. 5-10s. API id gen4_turbo. No native audio.

runway-aleph.key_constraint: In-context video editing model: remove/add objects, change style, camera angle from existing video. Distinct API. Released July 2025.

pika-2-2.key_constraint: 10s clips at 1080p, Pikaframes (keyframe transitions) and Pikaffects (VFX presets) modes. I2V supported. No native audio. Released Feb 2025.

luma-ray-2.key_constraint: 10s clips, 4K, strong physics and motion. T2V, I2V, keyframes, extend. API via Dream Machine. Released Jan 2025. No native audio.

luma-ray-2-flash.key_constraint: Faster, cheaper Ray 2 tier. 5s default, 720p/1080p. T2V and I2V. Commercial use per Luma ToS.

kling-2-1-master.key_constraint: 1080p, 5-10s, improved motion and prompt adherence. T2V/I2V, start+end frame. API via Kuaishou/Klingai. Released mid-2025.

kling-2-5-turbo.key_constraint: Speed-optimized 2.5 tier, 1080p, 5-10s, cheaper than Master. API id kling-v2.5-turbo. Lip-sync and motion-brush features.

hailuo-02.key_constraint: 1080p, 6s/10s, improved physics. T2V and I2V. API via MiniMax. Released June 2025. No native audio (separate S2V-01 model for speech-to-video).

minimax-s2v-01.key_constraint: Subject-reference video: character identity from single image. 6s, 720p. API id S2V-01. Commercial use per MiniMax ToS.

hunyuan-video.key_constraint: 13B open-weights T2V, up to 129 frames at 720p. Apache-style license for commercial use in most jurisdictions. Downloadable. Released Dec 2024.

hunyuan-video-i2v.key_constraint: Image-to-video variant of HunyuanVideo, open weights. 720p, ~5s. Released Mar 2025.

wan-2-2.key_constraint: Open-weights T2V/I2V, MoE architecture, 720p-1080p, ~5s. Apache 2.0. Released July 2025.

wan-2-5.key_constraint: Native audio-video generation, 1080p, up to 10s. API via Dashscope. Released Sept 2025.

seedance-1-pro.key_constraint: 1080p, 5-10s, multi-shot narrative. T2V and I2V. API via Volcano/Doubao. Released June 2025.

seedance-1-lite.key_constraint: Speed/cost-optimized Seedance 1 tier. 720p, 5s. Distinct API id.

mochi-1.key_constraint: 10B open-weights T2V, Apache 2.0, 480p HD preview. Downloadable. Released Oct 2024.

ltxv-2.key_constraint: Open-weights real-time video gen, 4K, up to 60s with keyframes, native audio. Released Oct 2025. Open license for commercial use under tiered revenue cap.

haiper-2-5.key_constraint: 8s clips, 1080p, T2V/I2V. API via haiper.ai. No native audio.

stable-video-diffusion.key_constraint: Open-weights I2V, 14/25 frames, 576x1024. Stability Community License (non-commercial free; commercial tier). Image-to-video only.

stable-video-4d.key_constraint: Novel-view video synthesis from single video input, 8 views x 5 frames. Research license. Released July 2024.

higgsfield-dof.key_constraint: Cinematic camera-control DSL (dolly, orbit, crane presets). 1080p, 5-10s. Product UI and API.

higgsfield-soul.key_constraint: Photoreal aesthetic preset pipeline, 5-10s, 1080p. I2V and T2V via higgsfield.ai. Released 2025.

udio-v1-5.key_constraint: Text+lyrics music gen via 3rd-party APIs (musicapi.ai). Max ~2:10 tracks, MP3/WAV. Params: prompt, lyrics_type, prompt_strength, clarity_strength, lyrics_strength. Commercial license via paid tier only. No official public API.

suno-v5.key_constraint: No official Suno public API; access via third-party wrappers. Prompt = genre+mood+lyrics. Max ~4min. Superseded by v5.5 on 2026-03-26.

lyria-2.key_constraint: Vertex AI model id lyria-002. 30s WAV clips at 48kHz. Text prompt only, no reference audio. Instrumental focus. Commercial use on GCP terms.

lyria-3.key_constraint: Released 2026-04-07 on Vertex AI public preview. Lyria 3 Pro generates up to 3-minute compositions with structural control (intro/verse/chorus/bridge). SynthID watermarked.

lyria-realtime.key_constraint: WebSocket bidirectional streaming music-gen. Max 2s latency between control change and output. Style/tempo prompts updated live. Via Gemini API.

stable-audio-2-5.key_constraint: Up to 3-min tracks, stereo 44.1kHz. Supports audio-to-audio conditioning. Platform.stability.ai v2beta. Commercial license on paid plan. Duration 1-190s parameter.

stable-audio-open-1.key_constraint: Open weights on HuggingFace. Max 47s stereo 44.1kHz. SFX and short loops focus. Non-commercial research license unless Stability membership.

elevenlabs-music.key_constraint: Text-to-music or composition_plan JSON. Duration 3000-600000ms (10min max). Tempo/key cues work. /compose, /compose-detailed, /stream endpoints. Commercial on paid tier.

elevenlabs-v3.key_constraint: Most advanced TTS. 70+ languages. Audio Tags in brackets: [whispers], [sighs], [shouts]. 68% error reduction on complex text. Model id: eleven_v3.

elevenlabs-turbo-v2-5.key_constraint: Balanced quality/latency. 32 languages. Model id: eleven_turbo_v2_5. Good default for production voice agents.

elevenlabs-flash-v2-5.key_constraint: ~75ms latency for realtime agents. 32 languages. Model id: eleven_flash_v2_5. Use with Agents Platform.

elevenlabs-multilingual-v2.key_constraint: Emotionally rich, best for voiceovers/audiobooks. Model id: eleven_multilingual_v2. 29 languages.

openai-tts-1.key_constraint: Standard TTS. $15/1M chars. 4096 char limit per request. Voices: alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer. Output mp3/opus/aac/flac/wav/pcm.

openai-tts-1-hd.key_constraint: HD quality TTS. $30/1M chars. 4096 char limit. Same voices as tts-1, better fidelity.

openai-gpt-4o-mini-tts.key_constraint: Steerable TTS with instructions parameter (tone/delivery). $0.60/M input tokens + $12/M audio output (~$0.015/min). Supports voice persona prompts.

openai-whisper-large-v3.key_constraint: ASR + translation. 99 languages. Max 25MB file per request. Prompt param (~224 tokens) biases vocabulary. Open weights available.

openai-whisper-large-v3-turbo.key_constraint: Pruned v3 (4 decoder layers). 216x realtime. No translation mode — transcribe only. Available via Groq, Cloudflare Workers AI, HF.

gemini-3-1-flash-tts.key_constraint: Released 2026-04-15. 30 prebuilt voices, 70+ languages. 200+ audio tags, natural-lang style control (no SSML). Multi-speaker mode. SynthID watermarked.

azure-neural-tts.key_constraint: SSML-driven. 140+ locales, 700+ voices. $16/1M chars neural, $24/1M custom. Dragon HD Omni = newer HD tier. Custom Neural Voice needs 300+ training samples.

amazon-polly-generative.key_constraint: Billion-param transformer. $30/1M chars. Supports SSML subset. Most human-like Polly engine. Limited language set vs Neural.

amazon-polly-neural.key_constraint: $16/1M chars. 36 languages/variants. Full SSML support. IVR/telephony-optimized. Predictable latency.

deepgram-aura-2.key_constraint: TTS for voice agents. ~90-200ms TTFB. Plain text input, no SSML. WebSocket streaming. Pairs with Nova-3 ASR for full-duplex agents.

deepgram-nova-3.key_constraint: ASR. $0.46/hr. Keyterm prompting biases vocabulary. Real-time multilingual mid-utterance. Nova-3 Medical variant available. 5.26% WER English.

cartesia-sonic-3.key_constraint: 90ms TTFA (Sonic-2 at 40ms TTFB). AI laughter + emotion tags. WebSocket streaming. Plain text + inline emotion markers. Fast voice-clone support.

play-3-0.key_constraint: Multilingual conversational TTS, ~143ms latency. 30+ languages. Plain text + voice_id. Play.ht 600+ voice library + instant cloning.

playai-dialog.key_constraint: Multi-speaker dialog TTS. Speakers tagged inline. Used for podcast-style output. Available via PlayAI/Groq.

hume-evi-2.key_constraint: Speech-to-speech foundation model. 500-800ms response. Continuous voice modulation (gender/nasality/pitch). 10-15s clone samples. 11 languages. WebSocket only.

minimax-speech-02.key_constraint: AR Transformer TTS. 32+ languages. 5 emotion modes. Superseded by 2.6/2.8 (40+ langs, 7 emotions). HTTP T2A endpoint. Voice clone built-in.

minimax-speech-2-8.key_constraint: 2026 flagship TTS. 40+ languages, 7 emotion modes, interjection tags. Improved clone timbre. HD = quality, Turbo = latency. MCP server available.

cosyvoice-2.key_constraint: Open-source (Apache 2.0). Zero-shot + one-shot voice clone via 3-10s reference. Instruction-controllable (emotion, accent). Streaming. Chinese-focused multilingual.

f5-tts.key_constraint: Flow-matching non-autoregressive TTS. Open weights. Reference audio + text for zero-shot clone. EN/ZH. Self-host; no managed API.

sesame-csm-1b.key_constraint: Open-weight conversational speech model (Mar 2025). Maya/Miles personas via app.sesame.com. Community Python client exists; no formal public API.

meta-musicgen.key_constraint: Open-weights text-to-music. Small/Medium/Large/Melody variants. Max 30s default, extendable. Melody conditioning via reference audio. CC-BY-NC-4.0 weights.

meta-audiogen.key_constraint: Open-weights text-to-SFX (environmental sounds). Not music. Short clips (~10s). Via AudioCraft repo, Replicate. Research license.

riffusion.key_constraint: Spectrogram-via-Stable-Diffusion music gen. Now managed product at riffusion.com with lyrics-to-song, AI covers, extension, section replacement. MIT weights for v1.

mubert-api.key_constraint: Royalty-free generative music API. Prompt = tag list (genre/mood/activity). Streaming or file output. Commercial license included in paid tiers.

aiva.key_constraint: Symbolic + audio classical/cinematic music gen. Style reference or preset-driven (not free-text). MIDI export. Pro plan = full copyright ownership.
